def: one of the short sections of equal length that a piece of music is divided into, and the notes that are in it
the profession of barrister (= a lawyer in a higher court)
to write music
a man’s singing voice with a low range; a man with a bass voice
a group of people who sing together, for example in church services or public performances

the place where legal trials take place and where crimes, etc. are judged ; the people in a court, especially those who make the decisions, such as the judge and jury ; a place where games such as tennis and basketball are played

information about a performance, an actor’s career, a piece of music, etc. printed in a special book or on a record cover, etc. ; a short comment on a word or passage in a book ; a piece of paper money

to keep a permanent account of facts or events by writing them down, filming them, storing them in a computer, etc. ; to make a copy of music, a film, etc. or to convert sound or a performance into a permanent form, so that you can listen to or watch it again ; to perform music so that it can be copied, stored and played back
to throw the ball to the person who is batting ; to hit the ball in a high curve ; to move up and down on the water or in the air ; to set up a tent or a camp for a short time
a person of the type mentioned ; the shape of a person seen from a distance or not clearly ; a person or an animal in a drawing, painting, etc., or in a story
to plan or organize something in advance ; to put something in a particular order; to make something neat or attractive
to deal with a situation, a person, an area of work or a strong emotion ; to touch, hold or move something with your hands ; to control a vehicle, an animal, a tool, etc.

the power to make decisions about how a country, an area, an organization, etc. is run ; the ability to make somebody/something do what you want ; the act of limiting or managing something; a method of doing this ; the switches and buttons, etc. that you use to operate a machine or a vehicle

to do something with a machine, a method, an object, etc. for a particular purpose ; to take a particular amount of a liquid, substance, etc. in order to achieve or make something ; to say or write particular words or a particular type of language

to exchange money for the same amount in different coins or notes ; to exchange something that you have bought for something else, especially because there is something wrong with it; to give a customer a new item because there is something wrong with the one they have bought ; to go from one bus, train, etc. to another in order to continue a journey ; to put on different or clean clothes

details of where somebody lives or works and where letters, etc. can be sent ; a series of words and symbols that tells you where you can find something using a computer or phone, for example on the internet

a deeply felt request for money, help or information that is needed immediately, especially one made by a charity or by the police ; a quality that makes somebody/something attractive or interesting ; a formal request to a court or to somebody in authority for a judgement or a decision to be changed
the process of improving or developing, or of getting nearer to achieving or completing something
a long narrow part of an object or a machine, especially one that moves

a situation in which people are watching for danger and ready to deal with it ; a warning of danger or of a problem ; a signal on an electronic device to inform the user of something or remind them to do something
to throw the ball to the person who is batting ; to hit the ball in a high curve ; to move up and down on the water or in the air ; to set up a tent or a camp for a short time
notes: Sports×2 variants + 1 transport + 1 holiday; M3 should pick 1 sport + 1 non-sport

def: a person of the type mentioned ; the shape of a person seen from a distance or not clearly ; a person or an animal in a drawing, painting, etc., or in a story
notes: Person + body shape + drawing; M3 should drop body shape as variant

def: a deeply felt request for money, help or information that is needed immediately, especially one made by a charity or by the police ; a quality that makes somebody/something attractive or interesting ; a formal request to a court or to somebody in authority for a judgement or a decision to be changed
notes: Request + attractive + legal; M3 should pick request+legal, drop attractive

def: the fact of being responsible for your decisions or actions and expected to explain them when you are asked
the act of discovering or identifying the exact cause of an illness or a problem
the feeling of being frustrated ; something that causes you to feel frustrated
the ability to move easily from one place, social class or job to another ; the ability to move or travel around easily
the process of becoming well again after an illness or injury
to officially end a law, a system or an institution
a police officer
a performance by musicians playing popular music or jazz in front of an audience; a similar performance by a comedian
a reason for doing something
a person who knows a lot about a particular subject because they have studied it in detail
